Project Charter Agent: Automates the creation of project charter documents, reducing manual effort for project teams.
PBP Finder: Instantly identifies an employee's People Business Partner based on their cost center or line of business.
Nexify-The Agent: Answers employee questions about lifecycle events such as onboarding, role changes, and offboarding.
3rd-party resources helper: Guides managers and People team members through correct processes for non-employee and contractor resources.
Requisition Assignment Agent: Reviews open requisitions and automatically distributes them across the Americas Onboarding Team based on workload and assignment criteria.
Story Report Assistant: Helps the People Analytics team build and troubleshoot Story Reports in WorkWise Report Center using SAP training materials.
Process Design Agent Finder: Overlays KPIs on process maps, runs simulations, and recommends targeted improvements with ROI calculations to support data-driven process design.
WW Report advisor: Recommends the best WorkWise report for a user's needs based on their requirements, RBP, and available metrics.
My Actions Tracker or Project RAID Log: Aggregates action items from meeting notes, emails, and requests into a structured table with owners, due dates, and status tracking.
India Benefits Agent: Provides India-based employees with quick answers about local benefits including leave, medical insurance, car lease, and tuition reimbursement.
EMEA Onboarding Assistant: Answers onboarding questions specific to EMEA country requirements and directs users to accurate local resources.
Underperformance Management Agent: Automates templates, tracking, and guidance to support managers through underperformance cases consistently.
ER Process Agent for People Team: Provides the ER and People team with automated guidance and ready-to-use templates for employee relations processes such as investigations and cases.
RCM/Onb Troubleshooting Agent ( For DPS): Searches SOPs and troubleshooting guides to quickly resolve tickets raised for the DPS RCM and Onboarding team.
Annual Attestation of automation Agent: Streamlines the annual attestation of People Policies, SOPs, and Knowledge Articles by automating data extraction, workflow assignment, and deadline reminders.
DPS MU NHO Agent: Automates the scheduling and creation of New Hire Orientation sessions in Moody's University for new joiners.
Action Planner: Tracks in-flight action items, owners, and due dates from project plans and emails, with weekly automated reminders to the Project Manager and team.
Change Management Agent: Supports training, adoption, and user enablement for change management initiatives across the People team.
Integration/Technical Agent: Generates OData API queries for Employee Central to support integration and technical workflows.
Service Now Agent: Surfaces and displays ServiceNow ticket data to support the People team with case visibility.
Job Code Advisor: Guides users to the correct job code across entities and job families, and helps the Comp team track JPB mapping status.
Agent InsightRanger: Serves as a knowledgeable guide for People Connect processes, helping users navigate policies and procedures.
Tution reimbursement Program: Provides employees with details about the Tuition Reimbursement Program available globally.
Australia Benefit: Answers questions about benefits and policies available to Australia-based employees.
IM'PACT Agent: Responds to employee and manager FAQs related to the IM'PACT performance program.
Power BI Dashboard Assistant: Assists the People Analytics team with Power BI Fabric questions, DAX code, BW-Fabric mapping, and UAT/Prod connection details.
SOP PBI Builder: Guides users through preparing SOP documentation required for creating or enhancing Power BI dashboards.
Case Pilot: Lets users practice with dummy cases to build skills and confidence in a low-stakes training environment.
Job Description Validator and Database: Validates job descriptions against Job Architecture standards and tracks consistency from JD creation through TA intake.
Letter generation: Generates employment letters of all types — verification of employment, tax letters, termination letters, and more.
Leave of Absence: Manages end-to-end Leave of Absence processes including medical, parental, unpaid, and short-term disability leave.
Sickness and absence mgmt: Monitors employee sick time and automatically flags when absence thresholds are reached.
Offer Letter Generation Automation: Automates offer letter creation by selecting the correct template, populating offer details, and routing for human review — reducing manual effort and audit risk in onboarding.
Real Estate Location Data AI Agent: Enables self-service queries on real estate office locations and lease information, replacing manual data pulls across ProLease, SiQ, Workwise, and SharePoint.
Hiring Manager Assist: Helps hiring managers ask HR questions, learn TA processes step by step, and generate common hiring outputs like RSM emails and job descriptions.
PBP Risks & Opportunities: Continuously monitors people and process signals across HR systems to surface early-stage risks and opportunities, enabling PBPs to intervene before issues escalate.
MREQ Self Assessment: Scores leadership self-assessments automatically and connects results to a Copilot agent that guides leaders through personalized development planning.
Employee Relations Administration (ERA): Automates the complex, manual data validation and document generation steps involved in US involuntary exits, with human review checkpoints built into the workflow.
Decision Grade Job Architecture Database: Builds a centralized, governance-controlled database of approved job descriptions and job family frameworks to serve as the source of truth for compensation and People team processes.
In Good Standing Agent: Consolidates checks across HR systems — GPS ratings, ER cases, compliance flags — to instantly determine whether an employee meets the 'in good standing' threshold.
Helping employees and managers quickly d: Generates personalized, context-grounded SMART objectives for employees by pulling from real work data — projects, priorities, and stakeholder inputs — and prompts quarterly refreshes to keep goals aligned.
Performance Pulse Insights Agent: Transforms raw Performance Pulse data into real-time compliance dashboards, predictive risk alerts, and NLP-scored feedback quality insights for the People team, PBPs, and leaders.
Manager 180 Development Agent: Reads a manager's 180 scores across ManageForward pillars and generates a personalized 90-day development plan with follow-up check-ins at 30, 60, and 90 days.
Universal Placeholder Platform for Event: Creates a centralized AI-powered calendar where stakeholders can add event placeholders and see all large-scale organizational events to prevent scheduling conflicts.
US Regional Business Partner: Continuously monitors US federal, state, and local regulatory developments relevant to Compensation and People practices, proactively alerting the team to changes, deadlines, and required actions.
Compensation Recommendation Agent: Generates standardized, policy-compliant compensation recommendations for offers, promotions, and adjustments — replacing manual Excel analysis and flagging exceptions for human review.
Agentic Career Center: An always-on career development platform with integrated agents for coaching, development planning, skills gap identification, and resume building.
FICA Status Review Agent: Automatically reviews Substantial Presence Test documents submitted by new hires and determines FICA Subject or FICA Exempt status by applying IRS rules and Moody's internal guidelines.
ER Notification Script Automation: Generates notifier and manager scripts for employee notifications by mapping data from an Excel file to Word templates, handling language variations for severance, retirement, and immigration scenarios.
